tools.name: list_workflows
tools.description: List supported workflows and current model versions via GET /v1/workflows

tools.name: get_workflow_schema
tools.description: Fetch required fields, optional fields, enums, and an example payload for a workflow via GET /v1/workflows/{workflow}/schema

tools.name: validate_workflow_payload
tools.description: Validate and normalize a workflow payload without consuming a scoring call via POST /v1/workflows/{workflow}/validate

tools.name: score_workflow
tools.description: Score Sentinel healthcare workflows via POST /v1/score

tools.name: score_batch
tools.description: Score up to 25 workflow items sequentially in one request via POST /v1/score/batch

tools.name: get_limits
tools.description: Retrieve plan limits, trial quota, and upgrade state via GET /v1/limits

tools.name: get_usage
tools.description: Retrieve monthly scoring call usage via GET /v1/usage

tools.name: submit_feedback
tools.description: Submit structured claims outcome feedback via POST /v1/feedback
